metadata.task: Create the car model in Workspace with a basic chassis, wheels, and body.
Create a RemoteEvent in ReplicatedStorage to communicate car movement from the client to the server.
Write a ServerScriptService script to receive car movement commands from clients and apply them to the car model.
Implement basic physics for the car, such as engine acceleration and deceleration.
metadata.text:
TASK WAS: Implement basic physics for the car, such as engine acceleration and deceleration.
SUCCESSFUL COMMANDS EXECUTED:
[
  {
    "type": "create_instance",
    "payload": {
      "className": "Script",
      "parent": "ServerScriptService",
      "name": "CarPhysics",
      "properties": {
        "Source": "local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local CarMovementEvent = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("CarMovementEvent")

CarMovementEvent.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player, direction, speed)
    local character = player.Character
    if character then
        local primaryPart = character.PrimaryPart
        if primaryPart then
            primaryPart.Velocity = primaryPart.Velocity + (direction * speed)
        end
    end
end)

local function applyPhysics(player, dt)
    local character = player.Character
    if character then
        local primaryPart = character.PrimaryPart
        if primaryPart then
            primaryPart.Velocity = primaryPart.Velocity - (primaryPart.Velocity.Unit * 10 * dt)
        end
    end
end

game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt)
    for _, player in pairs(game:GetService("Players").Players:GetPlayers()) do
        applyPhysics(player, dt)
    end
end)"
      }
    }
  }
]

metadata.task: Write a LocalScript in StarterPlayerScripts to handle car movement using ASDW keys.
metadata.text:
TASK WAS: Write a LocalScript in StarterPlayerScripts to handle car movement using ASDW keys.
SUCCESSFUL COMMANDS EXECUTED:
[
  {
    "type": "insert_script",
    "payload": {
      "className": "LocalScript",
      "parent": "StarterPlayer.StarterPlayerScripts",
      "name": "CarMovementHandler",
      "source": "local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local CarMovementEvent = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("CarMovementEvent")

local player = Players.LocalPlayer

player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(character)
    local primaryPart = character.PrimaryPart
    if primaryPart then
        primaryPart.Touched:Connect(function(hit)
            if hit:IsDescendantOf(Workspace.CarModel) then
                CarMovementEvent:FireServer(hit.Name, 10)
            end
        end)
    end
end)
"
    }
  }
]

metadata.task: Create a UI element in StarterGui to display the car's speed and other relevant information.
metadata.text:
TASK WAS: Create a UI element in StarterGui to display the car's speed and other relevant information.
SUCCESSFUL COMMANDS EXECUTED:
[
  {
    "type": "insert_script",
    "payload": {
      "className": "Script",
      "parent": "StarterPlayer.StarterPlayerScripts",
      "name": "CarInfoUpdater",
      "source": "local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local CarInfoUpdateEvent = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("CarInfoUpdateEvent")

CarInfoUpdateEvent.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player, speed, fuel)
    local CarInfoUI = player:WaitForChild("StarterGui"):WaitForChild("CarInfoUI")
    local SpeedLabel = CarInfoUI:WaitForChild("SpeedLabel")
    local FuelLabel = CarInfoUI:WaitForChild("FuelLabel")

    SpeedLabel.Text = "Speed: " .. speed .. " km/h"
    FuelLabel.Text = "Fuel: " .. fuel .. "%"
end)
"
    }
  },
  {
    "type": "insert_script",
    "payload": {
      "className": "Script",
      "parent": "ServerScriptService",
      "name": "CarInfoUpdater",
      "source": "local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local CarInfoUpdateEvent = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("CarInfoUpdateEvent")

CarInfoUpdateEvent.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player, speed, fuel)
    local CarInfoUI = player:WaitForChild("StarterGui"):WaitForChild("CarInfoUI")
    local SpeedLabel = CarInfoUI:WaitForChild("SpeedLabel")
    local FuelLabel = CarInfoUI:WaitForChild("FuelLabel")

    SpeedLabel.Text = "Speed: " .. speed .. " km/h"
    FuelLabel.Text = "Fuel: " .. fuel .. "%"
end)
"
    }
  }
]

metadata.task: Create a new ScreenGui for the car interaction UI, with two buttons: 'Drive' and 'Get In'. This UI should be positioned above the car and be accessible to players when they get close to the car.
metadata.text:
TASK WAS: Create a new ScreenGui for the car interaction UI, with two buttons: 'Drive' and 'Get In'. This UI should be positioned above the car and be accessible to players when they get close to the car.
SUCCESSFUL COMMANDS EXECUTED:
[
  {
    "type": "create_instance",
    "payload": {
      "className": "Script",
      "parent": "ServerScriptService",
      "name": "CarControl",
      "properties": {
        "Source": "local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local CarMovementEvent = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("CarMovementEvent")

local function PlayerControl(player)
    local function usePlaneControl(planeControl)
        -- Logic to use plane control
    end

    local function landPlane(planeControl)
        -- Logic to land plane
    end

    local function flyPlane(planeControl, direction, speed)
        -- Logic to fly plane
    end

    player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(character)
        local primaryPart = character.PrimaryPart
        if primaryPart then
            primaryPart.Touched:Connect(function(hit)
                if hit:IsDescendantOf(game.Workspace.Buildings) then
                    CarMovementEvent:FireServer(hit.Name, 10)
                end
            end)
        end
    end)
end

for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
    PlayerControl(player)
end

Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(PlayerControl)"
      }
    }
  }
]
